titleStmt.title: SII 17.374: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 374. (A.R. No. 345 of 1904.) KUḌUMIYĀMALAI, KULATTUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the rock-cut shrine in the Mēlaikōyil temple.

This inscription records the gift of 7 tuḷaippoṉ by Nakkan Śaṅkaraṉ of Vaḷḷiyūr, in Nallūr-nāḍu, for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirumēṟṟaḷi-perumāṉaḍigaḷ and another gift of 7 tuḷaippoṉ by Kuḻiyaṉāchchaṉ alias Arikulāntavāraṇappēraraiyaṉ, the headman of Siñjai in Iḍaiyaḷa-nāḍu for a perpetual lamp to Tirumūlaṭṭāṉattu-pperumāṉaḍigaḷ in Tirunilakkuṉṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matirai koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu
10 5 Āvatu kuṉṟiyūr nāṭṭut tirunilakkuṉṟattut tirumula
ṭṭāṉttup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Iṭaiyaḷanāṭṭu
ciñcal kiḻavaṉ kuḻiyaṉāccaṉāṉa Arikulān
tavāraṇapperaraiyaṉ nontā viḷakkoṉṟukku
vaitta tuḷaippoṉ 7� Itu paṉmāheśva
r rirakṣai śrī tirumeṟṟaḷip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku no
ntā viḷakkerippatāka nallūr nāṭṭu vaḷḷiyūr nakka
nñcaṅkaraṉ vaitta tuḷaippoṉ 7 � Itu paṉ
māheśvarari rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.374 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
